'''zangala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khaph|khaph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khaph|khaph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zangala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zængælæth|zængælæth]] || [[word:zængælæj|zængælæj]] || [[word:zængælæsh|zængælæsh]] || [[word:zængælæ|zængælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangangalath|zangangalath]] || [[word:zangangalaj|zangangalaj]] || [[word:zangangalash|zangangalash]] || [[word:zangangala|zangangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zangalath|zangalath]] || [[word:zangalaj|zangalaj]] || [[word:zangalash|zangalash]] || [[word:zangala|zangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangaflath|zangaflath]] || [[word:zangaflaj|zangaflaj]] || [[word:zangaflash|zangaflash]] || [[word:zangaflaf|zangaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zangalatha|zangalatha]] || [[word:zangalaja|zangalaja]] || [[word:zangalasha|zangalasha]] || [[word:zangalaka|zangalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zangalath|zangalath]] || [[word:zangalaj|zangalaj]] || [[word:zangalash|zangalash]] || [[word:zangala|zangala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zangalathal|zangalathal]] || [[word:zangalajal|zangalajal]] || [[word:zangalashal|zangalashal]] || [[word:zangalakal|zangalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zangalathatha|zangalathatha]] || [[word:zangalajaja|zangalajaja]] || [[word:zangalashasha|zangalashasha]] || [[word:zangalaka|zangalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zangalathan|zangalathan]] || [[word:zangalajan|zangalajan]] || [[word:zangalashan|zangalashan]] || [[word:zangalakan|zangalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zangalathaoro|zangalathaoro]] || [[word:zangalajaoro|zangalajaoro]] || [[word:zangalashaoro|zangalashaoro]] || [[word:zangalakaoro|zangalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
